metadata.title:
Cars in Plenty to Garry People to the
Companies Pleasure Park but None
To That Of Its Competitor, In Con-
sequence Many a Family Lost a
Long Anticipated Outing.

pages.raw_text:
The Washington Water Power COM
pany owns Natatorium park. The
Hieber Brewing company owns Hias
watha park. 4


The Washington Water Power
company owns system of street
cars running to these resorts and is
supposed to serve the public i'm
partially. The Hieber Brewing COM
pany owns no cars.


Both the Washington Water Power
company the Hieber Brewing COM
pany had things doing at their re-
spective parks on the Fourth of July.
Both wanted people to see these
things and spend their money-both
needed street cars.


There was five-minute service to
Natatorium park and 40-minute to
Hiawatha park The cars ran to
Natatorium park on the night of the
Fourth until all the people got tired
and went home. Service to Hia-
watha park stopped at 1880, regard
